title: Home / Landing Page
description: The main landing page or home page of Akshay's portfolio website. It features the primary call to action to speak with his AI twin, a list of primary areas (About, Experience, Projects, Skills, Contact), and a matrix rain background.
businessValue: Welcome page introducing the interactive portfolio.

title: Adobe Experience
description: Akshay's current role as a Senior Engineer at Adobe. He led the transition of Adobe Advertising Cloud from legacy architecture to a next-gen Nx mono-repo, vastly increasing developer velocity. He also standardized the UI layer by migrating 30+ custom components to Web Components.
businessValue: Shows leadership in large-scale infrastructure migrations, expertise in Nx mono-repos, and deep understanding of Web Components and design systems.

title: AI Workflow Engineering
description: Pioneered the use of next-generation AI-driven tools like Devin, Cursor, and Claude Code at Adobe to automate boilerplate and accelerate rapid prototyping for complex features.
businessValue: Demonstrates forward-thinking engineering practices and the ability to leverage cutting-edge AI tools to increase team productivity and delivery speed.

title: Nagarro Experience
description: Associate Staff Engineer at Nagarro, where he spearheaded end-to-end design of complex UI systems including high-volume data grids. Achieved 30% performance improvements using background processing threads.
businessValue: Highlights strong capabilities in performance optimization, memory management profiling using Chrome DevTools, and handling complex data grids.

title: Zeta Suite Experience
description: SDE-2 at Zeta Suite working on the Sodexo project. Built a comprehensive marketplace store using Vue.js.
businessValue: Shows adaptability to fast-paced environments and practical experience with Vue.js in e-commerce marketplace contexts.

title: Fidelity International Experience
description: Analyst Programmer at Fidelity International. Engineered a pension tracking and transfer tool for UK-based users.
businessValue: Demonstrates experience in the FinTech sector, handling complex business logic for investment management platforms.

title: Infosys Experience
description: Senior Systems Engineer at Infosys. Launched high-impact features including a Google Maps-based community interface and a responsive planning framework.
businessValue: Highlights early-career foundational engineering, map-based UI development, and robust application delivery.

title: Core Technical Skills
description: Specialist in Angular and modern JavaScript. Proficient in TypeScript, React, Vue.js, RxJS, and Micro-Frontend architecture. Features a visually refined neon skill grid with interactive tool icons, including dedicated sections for next-gen AI tools like Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, and Antigravity.
businessValue: Validates deep technical expertise across modern frontend frameworks and architectural patterns.

title: About Me
description: A glimpse into Akshay's personal interests including Photography, Traveling, and Pets. Features a live Spotify playlist, a Connect section, and a timeline of Awards: Org-level Hackathon Winner and 3x Spot Award at Adobe, A-Team Award and Cheerboard Award at Nagarro, and 3x Insta Award at Infosys.
businessValue: Provides a comprehensive personal profile, showcasing well-rounded interests and personal achievements alongside professional milestones.

title: Featured Projects
description: A showcase of Akshay's latest architectural and frontend projects, including NameApp, AI Resume Builder, EqLens, and Flokk.
businessValue: Demonstrates practical application of skills in real-world scenarios and passion for building.

title: NameApp Project
description: A platform to help you discover and purchase the perfect domain name for your next big idea.
businessValue: Exhibits practical application of domains, integrations, and startup MVP development.

title: AI Resume Builder Project
description: An intelligent application that uses AI to help you construct a professional, high-impact resume in minutes.
businessValue: Demonstrates integration of LLMs/AI with interactive document generation in Next.js.

title: EqLens Project
description: Advanced Market Ripple Explorer. Trace news impacts and cascading effects across Indian and Global equities with AI-driven intelligence.
businessValue: Highlights FinTech experience, handling heavy data relationships, and AI-driven market intelligence.

title: Flokk Project
description: A community-driven travel platform that helps people connect through travel.
businessValue: Shows expertise in map integrations, community networks, and user-generated travel content systems.

title: Contact Me
description: Get in touch for frontend architecture consulting, AI-workflow implementation, or general inquiries.
businessValue: Direct channel to connect with Akshay for potential collaborations.

title: Education History
description: Akshay holds a Bachelor of Technology (BTech) in Electronics and Communications Engineering from B.M. Institute of Engineering and Technology (2012-2016). He also completed a Frontend Developer Nanodegree from Udacity, and studied at Army Public School Udhampur (2003-2012).
businessValue: Provides the foundational engineering academic background and specialized web development certification that supports his senior roles.
